column1: # m-modern-corpus — upstream provenance table (single source of truth).
# Authoritative for `subdir → upstream URL → SPDX license` mapping.
# LICENSES.md is the human-readable mirror; per-subdir LICENSE / COPYING /
# NOTICE files inside each subdir remain the legal source of truth for that
# Format: TAB-separated. Comment lines start with `#` and are ignored.
# the SPDX-permitted marker for subdirs whose components carry different
